scripts.build: bun run clean && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.verify: bun run check:release-hygiene && bun test && bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.release:check: bun run check:release-hygiene && bun run install:locked && bun test && bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.ops:smoke:real:session: bun ./src/cli.ts smoke real --worker-binary codexcode --execution-mode session --verify-session-flow --verify-session-reattach --backend sqlite --api-exposure untrusted_network --api-token ops-smoke-token --timeout-seconds 120
scripts.ops:smoke:v2:session:fixture: bun ./scripts/run-ops-smoke.ts success --worker-binary ./scripts/fixtures/smoke-session-worker.sh --mode fixture --execution-mode session --verify-session-flow --backend sqlite --api-exposure untrusted_network --api-token ops-smoke-token
scripts.ops:smoke:session:reattach:fixture: bun ./scripts/run-ops-smoke.ts success --worker-binary ./scripts/fixtures/smoke-session-worker.sh --mode fixture --execution-mode session --verify-session-flow --verify-session-reattach --backend sqlite --api-exposure untrusted_network --api-token ops-smoke-token
scripts.ops:verify:v2: bun run ops:smoke:fixture && bun run ops:smoke:timeout:fixture && bun run ops:smoke:v2:session:fixture && bun run ops:migrate:dry-run
scripts.ops:verify:distributed: bun run ops:smoke:multihost:prototype && bun run ops:smoke:multihost:service
scripts.ops:verify:deep:weekly: bun run ops:verify:deep && bun run ops:probe:bun-exit && bun run ops:probe:bun-exit:migration
scripts.release:v2:check: bun run verify && bun run ops:verify:v2
scripts.release:distributed:check: bun run release:v2:check && bun run ops:verify:distributed
scripts.release:ga:check: bun run release:distributed:check && bun run ops:verify:rc && bun run ops:smoke:real:preflight && bun run ops:readiness:ga
scripts.release:v1:check: bun run release:ga:check && bun run ops:providers:cutover && bun run ops:dr:plan && bun run ops:capacity:baseline && bun run ops:audit:handoff && bun run ops:readiness:v1-rc
scripts.release:production:check: bun run release:v1:check && bun run ops:smoke:multihost:service && bun run ops:smoke:multihost:daemon && bun run ops:readiness:production
